context: Evaluates whether the candidate correctly authors a skill definition file following the agentic-collections YAML frontmatter conventions. The skill must include all mandatory fields with valid values, and the color must reflect the read-only nature of the operation.

checklist.name: Required fields present
checklist.description: The SKILL.md frontmatter includes all four mandatory fields: name, description, model, and color. No required field is missing.

checklist.name: kebab-case name
checklist.description: The name field uses kebab-case (lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only; starts with a letter; no consecutive hyphens; no leading or trailing hyphens) and matches the parent directory name.

checklist.name: Description format
checklist.description: The description field includes at least one 'Use when' example (as a quoted user phrase or bullet) and at least one 'NOT for' anti-pattern that names an alternative skill.

checklist.name: Correct color for read-only skill
checklist.description: The color field is set to 'cyan', which is the correct value for read-only (list/view/get) operations per the risk classification convention.

checklist.name: Valid model value
checklist.description: The model field is set to one of the three valid values: inherit, sonnet, or haiku.

checklist.name: Token-efficient description
checklist.description: The description field is concise and stays under 500 tokens. It defers implementation details to the skill body rather than embedding them in the frontmatter.
